creator: marketing@vellance.com
text: Vellance B.V. is a Dutch managed hosting provider located in Amsterdam. Our core-business is delivering advanced Managed hosting platforms. Vellance primarily works with FreeBSD (since the 90's), so it's not a surprise our managed hosting platforms and Virtual Enterprise Cloud environment is completely based on a FreeBSD infrastructure. Next to Virtual Dedicated Servers we offer many products like Private Cloud infrastructures, Media hosting, datacentre facilities and hosting consultancy.
